'''鈭歴-l-w''' ('''kasalaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyophilize|lyophilize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyophilize|lyophilize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| kasalaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalaw|thisalaw]] || [[word:jisalaw|jisalaw]] || [[word:shisalaw|shisalaw]] || [[word:kisalaw|kisalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusalaw|thuthusalaw]] || [[word:jujusalaw|jujusalaw]] || [[word:shushusalaw|shushusalaw]] || [[word:kukusalaw|kukusalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusalaw|thusalaw]] || [[word:jusalaw|jusalaw]] || [[word:shusalaw|shusalaw]] || [[word:kusalaw|kusalaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusalaw|thusalaw]] || [[word:jusalaw|jusalaw]] || [[word:shusalaw|shusalaw]] || [[word:kusalaw|kusalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesalaw|thesalaw]] || [[word:jesalaw|jesalaw]] || [[word:shesalaw|shesalaw]] || [[word:kesalaw|kesalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosalaw|thothosalaw]] || [[word:jojosalaw|jojosalaw]] || [[word:shoshosalaw|shoshosalaw]] || [[word:kokosalaw|kokosalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosalaw|thosalaw]] || [[word:josalaw|josalaw]] || [[word:shosalaw|shosalaw]] || [[word:kosalaw|kosalaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosalaw|thosalaw]] || [[word:josalaw|josalaw]] || [[word:shosalaw|shosalaw]] || [[word:kosalaw|kosalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙salaw|th忙salaw]] || [[word:j忙salaw|j忙salaw]] || [[word:sh忙salaw|sh忙salaw]] || [[word:k忙salaw|k忙salaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasalaw|thathasalaw]] || [[word:jajasalaw|jajasalaw]] || [[word:shashasalaw|shashasalaw]] || [[word:kakasalaw|kakasalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasalaw|thasalaw]] || [[word:jasalaw|jasalaw]] || [[word:shasalaw|shasalaw]] || [[word:kasalaw|kasalaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasalaw|thasalaw]] || [[word:jasalaw|jasalaw]] || [[word:shasalaw|shasalaw]] || [[word:kasalaw|kasalaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasalaw|shasalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasalaw|goshasalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasalaw|gokishasalaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasalawn眉|shasalawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasalawnkn眉|goshasalawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalawn眉|gokishasalawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasalawsh毛|shasalawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasalawnksh毛|goshasalawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasalawsh毛|gokishasalawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalawro|shasalawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalawnkro|goshasalawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalawro|gokishasalawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalawmu|shasalawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalawnkmu|goshasalawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalawmu|gokishasalawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasalawsher|shasalawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasalawnksher|goshasalawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasalawsher|gokishasalawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasalawng|shasalawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasalawnkng|goshasalawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasalawng|gokishasalawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasalawya|shasalawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasalawnkya|goshasalawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasalawya|gokishasalawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasalawyam|shasalawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasalawnkyam|goshasalawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasalawyam|gokishasalawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalawn眉sh毛|shasalawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalawnkn眉sh毛|goshasalawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalawn眉sh毛|gokishasalawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalawn眉ro|shasalawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalawnkn眉ro|goshasalawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalawn眉ro|gokishasalawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalawn眉mu|shasalawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalawnkn眉mu|goshasalawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalawn眉mu|gokishasalawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalawsh毛n眉|shasalawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalawnksh毛n眉|goshasalawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalawsh毛n眉|gokishasalawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalawsh毛ro|shasalawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalawnksh毛ro|goshasalawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalawsh毛ro|gokishasalawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalawsh毛mu|shasalawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalawnksh毛mu|goshasalawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalawsh毛mu|gokishasalawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalawron眉|shasalawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalawnkron眉|goshasalawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalawron眉|gokishasalawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalawrosh毛|shasalawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalawnkrosh毛|goshasalawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalawrosh毛|gokishasalawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalawromu|shasalawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalawnkromu|goshasalawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalawromu|gokishasalawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalawmun眉|shasalawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalawnkmun眉|goshasalawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalawmun眉|gokishasalawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalawmush毛|shasalawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalawnkmush毛|goshasalawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalawmush毛|gokishasalawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalawmuro|shasalawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalawnkmuro|goshasalawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalawmuro|gokishasalawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
